Title: CREATE USER
Description: Define a new database user account. Only monetdb administrator may create new database users.
See also: ALTER USER RENAME , ALTER USER SET PASSWORD , GRANT PRIVILEGES , DROP USER .
Examples:
CREATE USER
user_login_name
WITH [ ENCRYPTED | UNENCRYPTED ] PASSWORD
pass_phrase
NAME
full_name
[ SCHEMA
schema_name
]
    [ SCHEMA PATH
schema_names_list_as_string
]
    [ MAX_MEMORY
num_bytes
| NO MAX_MEMORY ]
    [ MAX_WORKERS
count
| NO MAX_WORKERS ]
    [ OPTIMIZER
optimizer_name
]
    [ DEFAULT ROLE
role_name
]

CREATE USER "Donald" WITH UNENCRYPTED PASSWORD 'Secret' NAME 'Donald Duck' SCHEMA "app1"
    SCHEMA PATH '"app1","sys","tmp"' MAX_MEMORY 8000000 MAX_WORKERS 12 OPTIMIZER optimizer DEFAULT ROLE "boss";
